# Extracao: Book Launch

- **Fonte:** Book Launch.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿BOOK LAUNCH

Welcome to the Book Launch Bonus. This is all about how to launch your book, PLF-style (a Case Study with Jeff’s NY Times Bestseller, Launch).

1 Book Launch Goals [8 minutes]
This lesson is about how to design a strategy for the launch of your book that is in line with your goals.

2 Book Launch Prelaunch - Part 1 [10 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how the Prelaunch for your Book Launch is similar to the Pre-Prelaunch of PLF, and often involves a Shot Across the Bow.

3 Book Launch Prelaunch - Part 2 [13 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn how Jeff built momentum and buzz ahead of the launch of his own book, "Launch: An Internet Millionaire's Secret Formula To Sell Almost Anything" ...

4 Bestseller Campaigns [18 minutes]
If you want to have a bestseller, it comes down to focusing your book sales into a specific period of time. That's what this lesson is all about.

5 Book Launch Interview [69 minutes]
This is an in-depth interview with Sean Platt and Johnny B. Truant where you'll learn how they adapted PLF strategies to successfully launch fiction.
